tagline: Lakebase (Autoscaling) is now in Public Preview on AWS.
what_it_does: Lakebase (Autoscaling) is now in Public Preview on AWS. This new version of Lakebase introduces autoscaling compute, scale to zero, database branching, instant restore, and a redesigned project based interface. To allow users to explore the new version, usage of Lakebase Autoscaling is free for a limited time.
why_it_matters: This new version of Lakebase introduces autoscaling compute, scale to zero, database branching, instant restore, and a redesigned project based interface.

capabilities.desc: Unified governance, lineage, and cross-source queries.
